title: Noooo... No forced widget view please - Very bad idea - Sad Face :(

posts.author: MrOrange (Sean Craig)
posts.cookedHtml:
Board Cards view is now forced to be widget view.

First: Why? One widget view option takes care of any needs for widget views.

Second: This creates a messy, confusing, hard to view and use GUI. Scroll bars inside of scroll bars. Really bad idea to force this arrangement.

EDIT: In addition, Cards view was the only view that worked exceptionally well on mobile for a user not familiar with Monday. This is now also hard to use on mobile, like other views.
